arts.ttl: I found it hard to have a good relationship with Pep Guardiola - now I can add to Man City misery
arts.sum: Manchester City head to Juventus for a huge Champions League clash in Turin.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to claims Liverpool have key title advantage over Arsenal and Man City
arts.sum: The Premier League leaders, four points clear with a game in hand, are also currently top of the Champions League table after five successive wins and are on the verge of guaranteeing a top-eight place

arts.ttl: Juventus youngster disables comments on social media following harsh criticism
arts.sum: Young Juventus left-back Jonas Rouhi has seemingly had enough with negative feedback on social media. The 20-year-old has been… The post Juventus youngster disables comments on social media following harsh criticism appeared first on Juvefc.com.

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges timeline as Premier League champions await verdict after trial concludes
arts.sum: A three-man panel will decide Manchester City's fate as they await to hear the outcome of their trial over 115 charges for alleged breaches of Premier League financial rules

arts.ttl: Premier League announce TV fixture changes including huge Man Utd and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Manchester United have been selected for three TV matches in February, while Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City all have key fixtures being televised that month
